name: PeerMe MultiSig: Get Action Last Index

description.en: Use when a user wants to see the total number of proposals ever created in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the last proposal ID number.
description.de: Verwenden, wenn ein Benutzer die Gesamtzahl der jemals erstellten Vorschläge in einer Multi-Sig-Wallet sehen möchte. Gibt die letzte Vorschlags-ID-Nummer zurück.
description.es: Use when a user wants to see the total number of proposals ever created in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the last proposal ID number.
description.fr: Use when a user wants to see the total number of proposals ever created in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the last proposal ID number.
description.ro: Use when a user wants to see the total number of proposals ever created in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the last proposal ID number.
description.it: Use when a user wants to see the total number of proposals ever created in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the last proposal ID number.

success.en: Last proposal ID: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}. {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created yet.' : 'Total proposals created: ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}
success.de: Letzte Vorschlags-ID: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}. {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'Noch keine Vorschläge erstellt.' : 'Erstellte Vorschläge gesamt: ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}
success.es: Last proposal ID: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}. {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created yet.' : 'Total proposals created: ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}
success.fr: Last proposal ID: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}. {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created yet.' : 'Total proposals created: ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}
success.ro: Last proposal ID: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}. {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created yet.' : 'Total proposals created: ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}
success.it: Last proposal ID: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}. {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created yet.' : 'Total proposals created: ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER}}

info.en: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created in this MultiSig wallet yet' : 'This MultiSig wallet has created ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER + ' proposal(s)'}}
info.de: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'In dieser MultiSig-Wallet wurden noch keine Vorschläge erstellt' : 'Diese MultiSig-Wallet hat ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER + ' Vorschlag/Vorschläge erstellt'}}
info.es: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created in this MultiSig wallet yet' : 'This MultiSig wallet has created ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER + ' proposal(s)'}}
info.fr: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created in this MultiSig wallet yet' : 'This MultiSig wallet has created ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER + ' proposal(s)'}}
info.ro: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created in this MultiSig wallet yet' : 'This MultiSig wallet has created ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER + ' proposal(s)'}}
info.it: {{LAST_INDEX_NUMBER === 0 ? 'No proposals have been created in this MultiSig wallet yet' : 'This MultiSig wallet has created ' + LAST_INDEX_NUMBER + ' proposal(s)'}}
